category_sources: source_facts.description says nanopb is a C library for encoding and decoding Protocol Buffer messages; official docs describe nanopb as an ANSI-C Protocol Buffers library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nanopb; source_facts.homepage is the official nanopb documentation site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dedicated docs page; official GitHub README is secondary documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official nanopb documentation links examples and older documentation to the nanopb GitHub project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions C, encoding/decoding, and Protocol Buffer messages; official docs mention small RAM/code requirements and microcontroller suitability.
